main_title: 3 Disturbing Accounts of People Who Were Blackmailed by Former Roommates Using Personal Secrets

stories.seed: I lived with three roommates in a small apartment, and it wasn't until we all went our separate ways that I realized one of them had been secretly recording our conversations and now they're using those recordings to blackmail me. I've been receiving these cryptic messages with audio clips of me sharing personal secrets, and I have no idea how to stop it or what they want from me.
stories.summary: A person is being blackmailed by a former roommate who recorded their private conversations and is now using the recordings for leverage.

stories.seed: I thought my former roommate and coworker, Rachel, was just being friendly when she offered to carpool with me to our job at the marketing firm, but it turns out she had been snooping through my belongings and found some pretty incriminating documents that she's now using to blackmail me into doing her work for her. I've tried to brush it off as mere office politics, but the fact that she knows my darkest secret and is using it to manipulate me has me walking on eggshells every time we're in the office together.
stories.summary: A marketing professional is being blackmailed by a former roommate and coworker who discovered their secrets during their daily commute.

stories.seed: I met my former roommate, Alex, at a truck stop on my cross-country road trip, and we ended up traveling together for a few days, but what I didn't know was that he had been rummaging through my luggage and found my journal, which contained some pretty explosive secrets that he's now using to blackmail me into giving him money and doing his bidding. I've been driving for hours with him in the passenger seat, and every time we stop for gas or food, he finds a way to slip in a threatening comment or gesture that reminds me of the power he holds over me.
stories.summary: A long-haul truck driver is being blackmailed by a former roommate who discovered their secrets while they were traveling together on the road.
